best_for: Comparing multiple carriers in one place
underwriting_speed: Same day to 2 weeks (varies by carrier)
perks: Marketplace compares quotes from dozens of top carriers simultaneously
Licensed agents available to guide you through the application
All policy types available through one platform
Free to use, no upfront cost to compare
Strong editorial resources and life insurance education
drawbacks: Acts as a broker, not a direct insurer
Final terms and underwriting are set by the underlying carrier
Some carriers on the platform have narrower no-exam eligibility
Online quotes are estimates; actual rates determined by underwriting
